TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tjukuvulj-viri ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 57 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 57 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjukuvulj-viri ga Djumulj ru Laliavan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjukuvulj-viri ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjukuvulj-viri ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa ***% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa *jumulj ru lalia*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tjukuvulj-viri ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 57 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 100% kyan ku 57 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 0% kyan ku hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjukuvulj-viri ga Djumulj ru Laliavan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjukuvulj-viri ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Tjukuvulj-viri ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa ***% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa *jumulj ru lalia*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ tjuku*ulj-*iri ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
